narrative:
Knox Twp township has 2,774 registered voters, with 60.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
